d:
Arjun, a financially struggling UK cab driver, accepts a high-paying delivery job in a desperate bid to reunite his family. But when the parcel vanishes at a remote destination, he and a hitchhiker named Liza are taken captive by a mysterious family. Arjun soon uncovers a far darker truth: they work for Europe's most powerful drug lord, creating a horrific new narcotic sourced from their victims.

Trapped in a brutal operation, Arjun is forced into a fight for survival against a ruthless crime syndicate, where escape may come at an unimaginable cost.
